ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: milk chocolate coating (52%) [sugar*, cocoa butter, cocoa mass, skimmed milk powder, milk fat, lactose (milk) emulsifiers, soya lecithin* (e322), polyglycerol polyricinoleate (e476)], peanut butter (48%) [peanuts, sugar, dextrose, milk fat, salt, emulsifier, soya lecithin (e322), mono & diglycerides (e471), acidity regulator, citric acid (e330), antioxidants, tbhq (e319)].
